response.justification: Sarah Smith has an impressive background in software development with extensive experience in leadership roles, architecture, and team mentorship. Her expertise spans multiple technologies, open-source contributions, and strategic project execution. However, her German language proficiency is only basic (contrary to the required C1), and her direct experience with UML and IT security/compliance is not prominently highlighted in her resume. Additionally, while she has managed interdisciplinary teams, her experience in IT consulting (a core aspect of the role) is limited.
strengths: Strong leadership experience in tech roles, including team mentorship and strategic project execution
Extensive background in open-source technologies and modern software systems (Dlang, Node.js, TypeScript, etc.)
Proven track record in architecture and system design, with contributions to high-performance, scalable platforms
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'basic' (far below the required C1 level)
Limited direct experience with UML and IT security/compliance (key requirements for the role)
No explicit mention of IT consulting experience despite the role's focus on client-facing projects
